message:
That long look your dog gives you? It's love — and there's real science behind it. 🥹

When you and your dog gaze into each other's eyes, BOTH of you get a rush of oxytocin — the same "bonding hormone" that flows between a parent and a newborn. Your dog isn't just staring at you; they're literally strengthening your bond.

Researchers also found that the reward center of a dog's brain lights up at the sound of their owner's voice. So yes — talking to your pup in that goofy voice actually means something to them.

Give your best friend a long look today. They feel it right back. 🐾💛
